displayName: Defender XDR Role Assignment Outside Approved Maintenance Window
description: Triggers when Defender XDR admin role changes occur outside of approved maintenance windows defined in approved-maintenance-window watchlist.
query: let win = _GetWatchlist("approved-maintenance-window") | where SearchKey == "default" | take 1; let StartMin = toscalar(win | extend p = split(tostring(column_ifexists("WindowStartUtc", "02:00")), ":") | project toint(p[0]) * 60 + toint(p[1])); let EndMin = toscalar(win | extend p = split(tostring(column_ifexists("WindowEndUtc", "04:00")), ":") | project toint(p[0]) * 60 + toint(p[1])); fxdr_role_changes_normalized() | extend MinOfDay = hourofday(TimeGenerated) * 60 + datetime_part("minute", TimeGenerated) | where MinOfDay < StartMin or MinOfDay > EndMin
